scripts.network: hc sandbox clean && npm run build:happ && UI_PORT=$(get-port) concurrently "npm run --filter ui start" "npm run launch:happ" "hc playground"
scripts.tests: npm run build:happ && npm t -w tests --
scripts.sweettest: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p nondominium_sweettest
scripts.sweettest:verbose: bun run build:happ && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/native-tests cargo test -p nondominium_sweettest -- --nocapture
scripts.package: npm run build:happ && npm run --filter ui package && hc web-app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.build:happ: npm run build:zomes && npm run build:zomes:hrea && hc dna pack vendor/hrea/dnas/hrea/workdir && hc app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.build:zomes:hrea: cd vendor/hrea && RUSTFLAGS='--cfg getrandom_backend="custom"' cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
